sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54489" key="katambluo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμβλ-υόω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <sense id="n54489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ κατημβλυωμένον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:18:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
